judging_note: Pre-built scaffold. Submissions populate as they come in over the R3 window (May 31 - Jun 14, 2026). After close: run scripts/refresh-poidh-leaderboard.py with bounty 1180 added to defaults; download every submission asset; ffprobe video durations; populate this JSON; ship at bettercallzaal.com/poidh-round3-judging.html.

floor_rules.label: Any format ad (image / video / meme / motion / cast / poster / audio drop)
X post URL submitted on POIDH bounty page
If audio: official promo MP3 OR source audio OR one clear instrumental (no layered library music under dialog)

rubric_tiers.label: Distribution
rubric_tiers.examples: Cross-post on additional Farcaster feeds + Bluesky/Threads/LinkedIn/IG/TikTok; tag @kennyistyping + @poidhxyz + @yerbearserker; include zabalgamez.com as visible link

rubric_tiers.label: Craft
rubric_tiers.examples: Clarity in 3s; on-brand energy not generic crypto; vertical/square mobile-native; captions if audio; ZABAL Gamez wordmark/logo visible; intro context line in post body; shareability

rubric_tiers.label: Substance
rubric_tiers.examples: One clear takeaway (free + 3 months + real mentors + real shipped builds for 100+ member community); names real beat (June workshops / July open build / August Finals / one of 3 tracks / mentor model / Finals stream); speaks to artist OR builder OR creator viewer

rubric_tiers.label: Bonus
rubric_tiers.examples: Direct invitation to MENTORS not just builders; testimonial pull-quote from past/current ZAO contributor; B-roll showing what a ZAO build looks like; plays in any orientation

claude_summary.recommended_winner_reason: TBD after Jun 14 close + judging pass

round_2_outcome.note: Round 2 (bounty 1166) winner picked by Zaal 2026-05-27. Only strict-floor 45-60s PASS with all three brand tags + Ep 19 + Kenny named in copy.
